mapper.sql: o.id,o.order_no,o.order_type,o.status,u.nickname AS user_nickname,o.contact_name,o.table_no, CONCAT_WS('',o.address_area,o.address_detail,o.address_house_number) AS address_summary, GROUP_CONCAT(oi.product_name ORDER BY oi.id SEPARATOR '、') AS product_summary, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(oi.product_image_url ORDER BY oi.id SEPARATOR ','),',',1) AS product_image_url, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity),0) AS total_quantity,o.pay_amount,o.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM orders o INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.id=o.user_id LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id=o.id WHERE o.shop_id=#{shopId} AND o.order_type=#{orderType}AND o.status=#{status} AND (o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR o.contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) GROUP BY o.id,o.order_no,o.order_type,o.status,u.nickname,o.contact_name,o.table_no,o.address_area, o.address_detail,o.address_house_number,o.pay_amount,o.create_time ORDER BY o.create_time DESC,o.id DESC
SELECT FROM orders o WHERE o.id=#{id} AND o.user_id=#{userId}
SELECT FROM orders o WHERE o.id=#{id} AND o.shop_id=#{shopId}
SELECT u.nickname FROM `user` u WHERE u.id=#{userId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.create_time>=CURRENT_DATE AND o.create_time<CURRENT_DATE+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND o.status NOT IN(8,9) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS today_order_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.finish_time>=CURRENT_DATE AND o.finish_time<CURRENT_DATE+INTERVAL 1 DAY AND o.status=7 THEN o.pay_amount ELSE 0 END),0.00) AS today_turnover, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS pending_accept_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status=3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS cooking_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_type=1 AND o.status=4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS ready_for_pickup_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_type=2 AND o.status=5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS delivering_count FROM orders o WHERE o.shop_id=#{shopId}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders WHERE id=#{id} AND user_id=#{userId} AND status=#{expectedStatus} AND version=#{version}
UPDATE orders WHERE id=#{id} AND shop_id=#{shopId} AND status=#{expectedStatus} AND version=#{version}
